personal.name: Ashwani Kumar Vishwakarma
personal.title: Expert Angular, React, C# and Node JS Developer
personal.bio: Expert Angular, React, C# and Node JS Developer with over a decade of comprehensive experience architecting resilient full-stack applications, robust APIs, and interactive responsive user interfaces. Specialized in enterprise microservices, complex SQL databases, and cross-platform mobile solutions.

availability.status: Available for Remote Part-Time Contracts & Consulting
availability.preferences: Only hourly rate projects (no fixed-cost projects)
availability.setup: Open to work as part of a team (currently individual, can scale and bring additional team members if needed)

best_skills: React JS / Next JS / Tailwind CSS

highlights: Architecting and delivering end-to-end features spanning Angular/React UIs, scalable Node.js/C# backends, and Oracle/Mongo database tiers.
Developing cross-platform mobile experiences leveraging Capacitor, Ionic, and React Native to deploy native-grade iOS/Android applications.
Engineering performant server components to handle heavy scraping, custom data polishing pipeline triggers, and durable schema optimization in MongoDB, DynamoDB, and MySQL.
Engineered robust web components and modular application hierarchies as a specialized remote Angular and C# developer.
Designed, optimized, and consumed REST APIs built with ASP.NET Core to enable high-throughput bidirectional data synchronization.
Developed and maintained highly-complex stored procedures and automated schedule job routines inside enterprise SQL databases.
Headed the layout and identification of high-performance Angular component hierarchies to maximize visual reuse across banking layers.
Designed and implemented production-grade enterprise microservices and secure custom APIs in .NET Core.
Created, fine-tuned, and audited transactional database objects and specialized index strategies within MS SQL Server.
Crafted single-page client architectures on top of Angular 7+ with robust clean state managers.
Built and maintained robust business logic APIs using ASP.NET Core MVC interfaces.
Optimized complex relational models and automated periodic ledger tasks using SQL Server Agents.
Delivered reactive views and routing configurations as an Angular developer in global operations teams.
Maintained high quality standards by authoring thorough automated front-end unit testing suites utilizing Jasmine & Karma.
Wired backend web-services securely with SPA states by consuming custom RESTful endpoints.

projects.name: MotoMate Fleet & Freelance Portal
projects.description: On-demand fleet servicing, scheduling, and multi-tenant freelance dashboard.
projects.architecture: NextJS/Angular client apps, Node.js/C# backend microservices, AWS server components, and multi-tenant relational schemas.
projects.challenges: Sychronizing state and scheduling queues across custom Angular dashboards and cross-platform Ionic/Capacitor mobile endpoints.
projects.learnings: Implementing streamlined, dry code structures, highly reusable components, and secure RESTful token bridges.

projects.name: Risk Integration System
projects.description: Real-time banking risk evaluator, compliance auditor, and ledger monitoring platform.
projects.architecture: Angular 7+ frontend, .NET Core API, MS SQL Server, and custom 3rd-party API ingestion relays.
projects.challenges: Assembling complex multi-level question systems that calculate associated risk values on-the-fly under strict audit rules.
projects.learnings: Using declarative reactive forms combined with fine-grained components to manage extremely high inputs without performance lag.

projects.name: Telegram Webhook Bot API
projects.description: High-throughput messaging, registry webhook dispatcher, and automated alerts broker.
projects.architecture: Event-driven Node.js & Express pipeline connected with Telegraf hooks and SQLite transactional audit log.
projects.challenges: Ensuring high-availability registration and deregistration processes for alert targets under peak traffic spikes.
projects.learnings: Implementing streamlined Express-based webhook endpoints with local SQLite persistence for transactional guarantees.

projects.name: Dynamic Product Pricing System
projects.description: Algorithmic pricing calculator computing costs based on custom offers, supply grids, and seasonal parameters.
projects.architecture: Angular 12 frontend UI, ag-grid enterprise table datasets, and Java Spring REST core service.
projects.challenges: Calculating complex pricing factors dynamically over sliding timeline periods without locking the browser main thread.
projects.learnings: Leveraging Web Workers for heavy client calculations paired with custom ag-grid cell renderers to render updates fast.

projects.name: Law Practice Management Suite
projects.description: Legal workflow organizer, case database, and client-facing secure interaction portal.
projects.architecture: Angular Client, ASP.NET Core backend API, MS SQL Server relational database, and localization modules.
projects.challenges: Enabling fluid, fully localized case updates while keeping strict separation between cases, contacts, and admin actions.
projects.learnings: Implementing robust client/contacts/matters hierarchical modules mapped over optimized database views.

projects.name: Engagement Review Portal
projects.description: Interactive employee peer appraisal, multi-level review workflows, and corporate satisfaction auditing platform.
projects.architecture: Modular Angular SPA, ASP.NET Web API 2, and MS SQL Server background tasks.
projects.challenges: Designing custom questionnaire builder panels where administrators define dynamic appraisal templates.
projects.learnings: Developing highly-flexible, data-driven templates using Angular directive composition and optimized scheduled database routines.

articles.title: Building a High-Throughput Event Bus with Redis Streams
articles.summary: Redis is often overlooked for persistent messaging. Here's how to build a reliable event bus that guarantees at-least-once delivery with consumer groups.

articles.title: Advanced Change Detection and Zone.js Optimization in Angular
articles.summary: Deep dive into Zone.js, the Ivy renderer, and how to surgically run operations outside Angular's core check loop to unlock flawless 60fps animations.

articles.title: Maximizing Email Deliverability: DKIM, SPF, and AWS SES Tuning
articles.summary: Emails landing in spam? Learn how to configure modern DNS records, handle bounces via SNS, and configure AWS SES to maintain a perfect sender reputation.
